Limited: LT26102700 Bond: 150000 Tender Issue Period: 09/07/26 - 15/07/26 Bid Closing Date: 27/07/26 Fee: 200 Bond Validity: 24/12/26- (150) days from the Bid Closing Date OfferValidity: 24/11/26- (120) days from the Bid Closing Date Scope of Work/Description:
The scope of this tender is to provide experienced vendor services to carry out 1-Annual/Major (Every 5 year) inspections /repairs of Escape capsules and Fast Rescue Craft (FRC) by respective OEM Authorized Service Engineer in accordance with SOLAS chapter III regulation 20, MSC.402 (96) and MSC.404 (96) and QatarEnergy standard "CORP-PAI-STD-005" for Lifting equipment's. 2-Attend on Ad hoc basis any repair/service requirements on Escape capsules and FRC including Davit/Winch systems and Load testing as and when required by QatarEnergy. 3-Carry out External Surface Coating, Polishing and Body repair of Escae capsules and FRC as per the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) recommendations and standards as and when required by QatarEnergy. 4-To provide contractor onshore workshop facility to carry out any repair/service which cannot be provided at the respective Capsule/FRC offshore location. Total Escape capsules-53 by 5 different manufacturers mentioned below. 1-,,Survival System International 2-,,Mulder & Rijke 3-,,FASSMER 4-,,NORSAFE 5-,,SCHAT HARDING Total FRC-3 by 2 different manufacturers mentioned below 1-,,NORSAFE 2-,,SEABEAR Locations: PS-1, PS-1 WHJ, PS-2, PS WHJ, PS-3, PS-3 WHJ, NFA, NFA WHP-3, FMB, FSO and Al-Morjan. Contract Duration: 5 years
